allow: Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); const deps={...p.dependencies,...p.devDependencies}; ['stripe','@stripe/stripe-js','paypal','braintree'].forEach\(k=>{ const found=Object.keys\(deps\).find\(d=>d.includes\(k\)\); console.log\(k,':', found ? deps[found] : 'NON INSTALLÉ'\); }\)")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\Android\\Android Studio" -Recurse -Filter "gradle-wrapper.jar" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Length -gt 50000 } | Select-Object FullName, Length -First 3)
